name: Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the chicken breast into long, half-inch wide strips.
2. To make a marinade, finely chop the garlic cloves and jalapeno peppers using a food processor with the chopping blade in place and motor running until smooth (about 10 seconds).
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the food processor and process until smooth (another 10 seconds).
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken and let marinate for 2 hours at room temperature or overnight in the refrigerator, turning occasionally.
5. Preheat the oven broiler.
6. Drain the chicken, reserving the marinade.
7. Arrange the chicken on a rack over a broiler tray and broil 3 inches from the heat source for 5 minutes, turning and basting with marinade. Continue broiling for another five minutes.
8. Serve with warmed tortillas, shredded lettuce, shredded cheese, chopped tomatoes, and salsa verde.
